caption: A video captures a screen displaying a sports video game interface titled "TOTW PRESENT." The center of the screen features a player card for "D'ANDRE SWIFT," identified as an "HB" with an "OVR" rating of "87." The background is a deep purple gradient, and various stats and currency values, such as "173,037," "14,600," and "2,343,543," are visible at the top. At the bottom, menu options read "MARK/UNMARK," "DISMISS ALL," and "BACK." In the lower-left corner, a small inset window shows a man with blonde hair wearing a dark blue t-shirt. He is reacting with excitement, gesturing with his hands and smiling. Between the early and later frames, the man's facial expression shifts from a look of anticipation to a wide, open-mouthed smile, and the inset window expands slightly to show more of the room behind him, including a glimpse of a decorated Christmas tree.
